#  View Locations on Drawings (Android) 
#####  Limited Release
This experience is available in **Australia, Canada, Ireland, United Kingdom, United States,** and **New Zealand**.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/permissions)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Generate Locations Hierarchy From Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/generate-locations-from-drawings)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Locations** tool using the Procore Android app.
  2. Tap a **location**.
  3. Tap **Open Drawing** to see all locations in relation to the drawing from which they were generated.
  4. To see a specific location on the drawing, swipe the **location cards** left or right.  
![Locations Cards](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/974a3d4d688582a12e33d40a03c69060/8bf61337ad6e88722e59473db8940a4c/locations-cards.png?fm=webp&h=190)
  5. On the location card, tap **Locate** ![Icon Locate Location Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ff401301291bdcdf5430d3a9d30fb30b/57bf8d355ce0428081983f8be34e1e96/icon-locate-location-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=20) to center the location on the drawing.


## See Also
  * [Locations (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/permissions)
  * [View Locations Heat Map (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/tutorials/view-locations-heat-map-android)
  * [How to Navigate Procore Maps? (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-How_to_Navigate_Procore_Maps_3F_\(Android\))
title: View Locations on Drawings (Android)
description: How to view locations in relation to the drawings from which they were generated, while using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
